notes: Reference values are taken from the rendered PKNCA vignette 'Computing NCA Parameters for Theophylline'.
PKNCA documents lin-up/log-down integration and states that the package has been cross-validated against Phoenix WinNonlin.
The 0-24 AUClast row is reported separately from the 0-Inf summary row in the vignette output.
dataset_citation: Boeckmann AJ, Sheiner LB, Beal SL (1992). NONMEM Users Guide — Part V: Introductory Guide. University of California, San Francisco. [Theophylline dataset: 12 subjects, single oral dose, 132 observations.] Also distributed as datasets::Theoph in R: Pinheiro J, Bates D (2000). Mixed-Effects Models in S and S-PLUS. Springer, New York.
